description: The narrator and central character. Writes a newspaper column called Sex and the City. Known for her love of Manolo Blahniks and her on-again off-again relationship with Mr. Big.
The oldest of the group and the most sexually liberated. Runs her own PR firm. Known for her confidence and frank approach to sex and relationships. Absent from AJLT S1 with cameo in S2.
The romantic and most traditional of the group. Works at an art gallery before marrying Trey MacDougal then Harry Goldenblatt. Converts to Judaism. Adopts daughter Lily.
The pragmatic and career-focused lawyer. Marries Steve Brady. Has son Brady. Moves to Brooklyn. In AJLT develops relationship with Che Diaz and moves to LA before returning to NYC.
Carrie's great love and eventual husband. Mysterious and commitment-phobic in early seasons. Marries Natasha then eventually Carrie. Dies of a heart attack in AJLT S1E1.
Carrie's serious boyfriend who she cheats on with Big. Proposes twice. Returns in AJLT S2 as a potential love interest for Carrie.
Carrie's gay best friend. Marries Anthony Marentino. Died during AJLT S1 production - written out via letter in episode 4.
Charlotte's gay best friend who eventually marries Stanford.
Miranda's boyfriend then husband. Opens a bar with Aidan. Reconciles with Miranda in SATC Movie.
Charlotte's divorce lawyer who becomes her second husband. They adopt Lily and have daughter Rose.
Charlotte's first husband. Struggles with impotence and his domineering mother Bunny. They divorce.
Carrie's boyfriend in early S6 who breaks up with her via Post-It note.
Carrie's Russian artist boyfriend who takes her to Paris. Neglects her at his art opening. Big rescues Carrie.
Big's second wife who Carrie is obsessed with. Chips her tooth when she catches Carrie leaving Big's apartment.
Non-binary comedian who hosts a podcast. Miranda develops feelings for Che and leaves Steve.
Carrie's new close friend in AJLT. A successful real estate agent navigating dating in her 50s.
Charlotte's new friend in AJLT. Married to Herbert Wexley with children.
Miranda's professor at Columbia. Deals with fertility decisions with her husband Andre.
Charlotte and Harry's adopted daughter. Becomes a piano prodigy.
Miranda and Steve's son. Has a girlfriend and growing up causes tension.
